shippingPolicy.overview: Carolina Futons offers multiple shipping options to get your furniture delivered safely and conveniently. Most in-stock items ship within 3-5 business days.

methods.name: Standard Shipping
methods.description: Curbside delivery via common carrier. Items are delivered to the curb or first dry area. You are responsible for bringing items inside.

methods.name: Local White-Glove Delivery
methods.description: In-home delivery within 50 miles of Hendersonville, NC. Includes unpacking, room placement, assembly, and packaging removal.

methods.name: Regional White-Glove Delivery
methods.description: Full-service in-home delivery for customers beyond local range. Includes unpacking, assembly, and packaging removal.

methods.name: In-Store Pickup
methods.description: Pick up your order at our Hendersonville, NC showroom. No shipping charges.
methods.timeline: Usually same day for in-stock items

deliverySchedule.note: Delivery windows are 2-hour blocks. You'll receive a confirmation call the day before delivery.

returns.policy: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy with your furniture, contact us within 30 days of delivery to arrange a return.
conditions: Items must be in original condition, unassembled (if applicable)
Customer is responsible for return shipping costs
Mattresses are non-returnable for hygiene reasons unless defective
Custom or special-order items may not be returnable
returns.refundTimeline: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

assemblyInfo.overview: Most of our furniture is designed for straightforward assembly. Here's what to expect:

categories.notes: Two people recommended. Night & Day frames include all hardware and step-by-step instructions.

categories.tools: Phillips screwdriver (KD Frames: all hardware included)
categories.notes: KD Frames beds have clearly labeled parts and assemble in 7 easy steps. Two people recommended for King size.
Premium flower series (Daisy, Poppy, Sagebrush, Clover, Ranchero), Murphy Cube, and San Sebastian arrive fully assembled. Orion requires minor setup. Murphy Express requires no assembly at all.
Casegoods arrive assembled — only drawer knobs need to be attached. Each piece includes two sets of knobs (wood and metal/pewter) so you can choose your style.
